title: festuca haenkei
intro: Festuca haenkei, also known as Haenke's fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to mountainous regions of Mexico, and its medicinal properties have been studied for their potential health benefits. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Festuca haenkei is traditionally prepared as an infusion, tincture, or tea, and is used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations.
